title: NaviWell charting workflow — ECW, CPT 99404, Z71.82, the gym-job operational manual
html:
NaviWell charting workflow — ECW, CPT 99404, Z71.82, the gym-job operational manual

Source: 2025-09-08 Apple Note. The detailed SOP Yahir wrote for himself for NaviWell Group — the Austin health-coaching gym job that became his primary bridge income starting Aug 2025.

TL;DR

  • NaviWell Group = the Austin wellness clinic where Yahir works as Health Coach (per the Oct 2025 resume and the Aug 2025 start date in the move note).
  • Patient-charting workflow in ECW (eClinicalWorks): open appointment → patient hub → Progress Notes (template = Trainer) → Assessment Code Z71.82 (lifestyle counseling) → Treatment Note (paste NaviWell quiz) → Billing CPT 99404 (preventive medicine counseling, individual, 60 min) → "Close IG – [Patient's Name]" hub action.
  • Key field-level rules: patient must verify email, must have primary diagnosis or "nothing populates", resting HR + BP every session, weight + body fat percentage monthly ("insurance needs to see progress"), educational material every chart, push patients toward diets-and-recipes tab.
  • Real patient names captured: Anontion Acosta (VRML training), Jorge Amaya (in-person 8:30am Monday).
  • Confirms Yahir's ISSA CPT certification is operational by Sept 2025 — the May 2025 todos noted "pay for ISSA exam"; here he's billing 99404 codes.

Pattern observed

The NaviWell job is the Austin bridge-income solution — replaces the Planet Fitness overnight shifts referenced in 2025 09 23 how im scraping by. This SOP is operational documentation he wrote for himself, not for a manager — same pattern as the beer ball rulebook (Yahir-as-rule-author). The acronym density (ECW, CPT, ICD, NaviWell, Hub) suggests rapid onboarding.

Privacy note

Two real patient names captured in the raw note. Acceptable to leave in raw (immutable) but worth flagging here that the wiki/summaries/ redaction discipline applies — names are mentioned but not analyzed/profiled.

Open questions

  • Is NaviWell still active in 2026? Or was this transitional only?
  • Does Yahir still hold the ISSA CPT active?
  • Anontion Acosta — VRML (Virtual Reality Markup Language? Or a procedure code?)
